from model import HMERModel
import torch
m = HMERModel(vocab_size=134)
ck = torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu')
print('keys:', list(ck.keys()))
print('cfg:', ck.get('cfg'))
print('exprate:', ck.get('exprate'))
print('epoch:', ck.get('epoch'))
print('params:', sum(p.numel() for p in m.parameters()))
# Test greedy decode shape
imgs = torch.zeros(1, 1, 64, 256)
mask = torch.ones(1, 64, 256, dtype=torch.bool)
m.eval()
with torch.no_grad():
    ys = m.greedy_decode(imgs, mask, max_len=20, sos=1, eos=2)
print('greedy out shape:', ys.shape, ys)
